request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。
- 公司历史语料：AIA Group
- 历史固定标题参考（只复用译法语义，不强制大小写和换行）：集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 -> Group Chief Executive and President’s Report
- 优先沿用该公司历史年报中已经稳定出现的栏目标题、导航名和管理层头衔译法。
- 若当前页面与历史年报中的页面形态接近，应优先参考该公司惯用的标题长度、表格标签写法和正式披露语气。
- 若历史英文标题采用全大写或特殊分行展示，仅借鉴其正式措辞，不强制沿用大小写和换行样式。
- 历史近似页面：
-   2024 p18 [showcase_narrative] 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告
-   2022 p17 [showcase_narrative] 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告
-   2023 p21 [showcase_narrative] 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

messages.content:
以下文本块版面过紧。请在不改变核心含义和正式风格的前提下，仅做最小必要压缩。
不要摘要，不要解释，只输出严格 JSON。
{
  "page_no": 14,
  "source_language": "Traditional Chinese",
  "target_language": "English",
  "problem_blocks": [
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b4",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "友邦保險中國業務在2020年為本集團新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，並在2021年初表現卓越，與2020年同期比較，",
      "current_translation": "AIA's Mainland China business made the largest contribution to the Group's new business value in 2020 and performed excellently in early 2021, with a significant increase in new business value recorded in the first two months of the year compared with the same period in 2020,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.499,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 54,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        126.47,
        527.26,
        138.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b6",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "要由於2019冠狀病毒病在首季爆發初期新銷售有限所致。年內稅後營運溢利增長14%，主要是由於我們日益增長",
      "current_translation": "due to limited new sales in the early stages of the COVID-19 outbreak in the first quarter. Operating profit after tax increased by 14% during the year, primarily due to our growing",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.784,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        158.7,
        527.24,
        170.65
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b8",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "在2020年，我們成功獲得監管機搆批復，將上海分公司改建為中國內地首家外資獨資人身保險子公司。於2021年",
      "current_translation": "In 2020, we successfully obtained regulatory approval to convert our Shanghai branch into Mainland China's first wholly foreign-owned life insurance subsidiary. In March 2021,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.792,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 53,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        206.7,
        527.25,
        218.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b9",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "3月，我們已獲得中國銀行保險監督委員會批復，准予在四川省開業。四川省是中國內地以國內生產總值計的",
      "current_translation": "we received approval from the China Banking and Insurance Regulatory Commission to commence operations in Sichuan Province. Sichuan Province is the sixth largest province in Mainland China by gross domestic product",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.597,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 48,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        222.71,
        529.77,
        234.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b11",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "香港在2020年2月初實施旅遊限制，來自中國內地訪港旅客的新業務銷售實際上已經停頓，導致新業務價值大幅",
      "current_translation": "Hong Kong implemented travel restrictions in early February 2020, and new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong effectively came to a halt, resulting in a significant decline in new business value.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.645,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        270.49,
        527.25,
        282.66
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b12",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "下降。與上半年比較，我們的代理分銷來自本地客戶的業務於下半年錄得雙位數字的銷售增長，維持顯著的市場",
      "current_translation": "Compared with the first half of the year, our agency distribution channel recorded double-digit sales growth from local customers in the second half, maintaining a significant market leadership position.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.669,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        286.71,
        527.12,
        298.67
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b13",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "領導地位。夥伴分銷渠道的新業務價值顯著低於2019年，乃由於透過零售獨立財務顧問渠道的中國內地訪港旅客",
      "current_translation": "The new business value from the partnership distribution channel was significantly lower than 2019, primarily due to the higher proportion of sales historically generated through the retail independent financial adviser channel from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.519,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        302.72,
        527.24,
        314.67
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b15",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "友邦保險泰國業務在下半年錄得非常強勁的表現。儘管新業務價值全年下降4%，但隨著外出限制放寬，按月表",
      "current_translation": "AIA's Thailand business recorded very strong performance in the second half. Although new business value declined by 4% for the full year, as restrictions on movement eased, monthly performance demonstrated positive momentum, with new business value in the second half recording 33% growth compared with the first half.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        350.5,
        527.26,
        362.67
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b16",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "現已展現正面動力，而下半年新業務價值較上半年錄得33%的增長。",
      "current_translation": "Positive momentum has been demonstrated, with new business value in the second half of the year recording 33% growth compared to the first half.",
      "translation_source": "model_repair_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.569,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 31,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        366.72,
        349.15,
        378.68
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b17",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "新加坡業務下半年亦有卓越的好轉，與上半年比較，新業務價值上升56%，按年則上升12%。新業務價值全年",
      "current_translation": "Singapore's business also showed excellent improvement in the second half, with new business value increasing 56% compared to the first half and 12% year-on-year. New business value for the full year",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.69,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 50,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        398.5,
        529.77,
        410.68
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b20",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "馬來西亞方面，新業務價值全年下降13%，特別反映在上半年嚴格執行的外出限制。下半年新業務價值回升，較",
      "current_translation": "In Malaysia, new business value declined 13% for the full year, particularly reflecting the strict movement restrictions enforced in the first half. New business value recovered in the second half, growing",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.696,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 50,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        462.51,
        527.13,
        474.69
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b21",
      "block_type": "label",
      "source_text": "上半年增長72%。",
      "current_translation": "72% compared to the first half.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.696,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 9,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        478.74,
        146.2,
        490.69
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b22",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "其他市場方面，下半年的新業務價值較上半年上升10%，其中南韓和印尼的回升幅度正面。整體來說，新業務價",
      "current_translation": "In other markets, new business value in the second half increased 10% compared to the first half, with positive recoveries in South Korea and Indonesia. Overall, new business value",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.766,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 50,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        510.52,
        527.16,
        522.69
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b23",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "值全年下降4%，主要由於新西蘭、菲律賓及印尼錄得跌幅。其餘的市場均錄得新業務價值正增長，其中越南、",
      "current_translation": "declined 4% for the full year, primarily due to declines recorded in New Zealand, the Philippines and Indonesia. The remaining markets all recorded positive new business value growth, with Vietnam,",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.702,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        526.74,
        527.32,
        538.7
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b25",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "代理渠道方面，我們轉移使用線上招聘和入職培訓的趨勢，支持新入職代理及代理主管人數錄得雙位數字增長。",
      "current_translation": "On the agency channel front, we shifted to leveraging online recruitment and onboarding practices, which supported double-digit growth in both new recruits and agency managers.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.775,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        574.53,
        527.12,
        586.7
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALNB"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b26",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "雖然疫情大流行期間面對面會議受到限制，導致新業務價值下降28%，但隨著限制放寬，加上各業務採用新的數",
      "current_translation": "Although face-to-face meetings were restricted during the pandemic, resulting in a 28% decline in new business value, as restrictions eased and businesses adopted new digital",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.789,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 50,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        590.75,
        527.2,
        602.7
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b27",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "碼工具，新業務價值在下半年已強勁回升。正面銷售動力延續至2021年，與2020年同期比較，代理業務在首兩",
      "current_translation": "tools, new business value rebounded strongly in the second half. Positive sales momentum continued into 2021, with agency business recording exceptionally strong new business value growth in the first two",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.67,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 52,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        606.75,
        527.22,
        618.71
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p14_b29",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "中國內地訪港旅客的旅遊限制影響我們的零售獨立財務顧問業務，導致夥伴業務於2020年的新業務價值下降",
      "current_translation": "Travel restrictions on Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong impacted our retail independent financial adviser business, resulting in a 41% decline in new business value from partnership distribution in 2020.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.674,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [

      "source_text": "Berhad（大眾銀行）的銀行保險夥伴合作，在2020年均錄得新業務價值正增長。",
      "current_translation": "Berhad (Public Bank) in Malaysia through bancassurance partnerships, both recorded positive new business value growth in 2020.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.755,
